name: Subliminal Clocks: Latent Time Modelling in Diffusion Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.01774v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models. Unlike standard diffusion-based appro...
description: arXiv:2607.01774v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models. Unlike standard diffusion-based approaches, DLMs are not explicitly conditioned on a timestep, raising a natural question: do these models internally represent denoising progress, and how is such information used downstream? In this work...
author: Maximo Eduardo Rulli, Thomas Vaitses Fontanari, Simone Petruzzi, Federico Alvetreti, Giorgio Strano, Donato Crisostomi, Giorgos Nikolaou, Tommaso Mencattini, Andrea Santilli, Emanuele Rodol\`a, Simone Scardapane, Alessio Devoto
